nasb.text: The kings of the earth did not believe, Nor did any of the inhabitants of the world, That the adversary and the enemy Could enter the gates of Jerusalem.

esv.text: The kings of the earth did not believe, nor any of the inhabitants of the world, that foe or enemy could enter the gates of Jerusalem.

cnv.text: 地上的君王，以及世上所有的居民都不相信， 會有任何敵人和仇敵攻進耶路撒冷的城門。

ccb.text: 世上的君王和居民都不相信敌人能闯进耶路撒冷的城门。
